OptionalReleaseEip.eip: The EIP address selected for release, including both IPv4 EIP and IPv6 EIP.
OptionalReleaseEip.releaseToRecycle: Whether to move the specified EIP to the recycle bin. Default is false, meaning the EIP will be released directly.
OptionalReleaseEip.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string with a maximum length of 64 characters. See Idempotency for details.
